form.formComment: Last start finished 2nd over 320m at Wagga beaten 3 lengths (18.56) behind Got A Message in a Grade 5 on March 20. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th over 401m at Richmond beaten 11 lengths (23.50) behind Supreme Lady in a Grade 4/5 on April 1. Expected to go very well.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th on March 16 over 318m at Dubbo behind Nates Fury beaten 9 lengths (18.84) in a Mix 1/2/3. Must be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 5th on March 16 over 318m at Dubbo behind Nates Fury beaten 9 lengths (18.84) in a Mix 1/2/3. Must be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together on the home turn and lost significant ground.
Tightened for room shortly after start and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 320m at Richmond. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 320m at Richmond. Hard to have this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the turn out of the back straight hampered and came together.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but ran over at the finish when a narrow fourth (22.85) over 400m at Bulli. Others read better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but ran over at the finish when a narrow fourth (22.85) over 400m at Bulli. Others read better.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by a neck at Temora over 330m (19.10) beating Lone Rustler in Grade 5 on March 25. This will test.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh over 365m at Nowra, beaten 13 lengths (21.69) behind El Condor Pasa in a Grade 5 on April 2. Others have better credentials.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when seventh over 330m at Temora. Likely to find this a bit tough.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Mix 3/4 on March 26 over 324m at Richmond Straight behind Pinch Point beaten 6 lengths (18.18). Happy to overlook recent efforts. Well placed and gets chance to find best.
